what_changed: Required BenchmarkSuite suite_id, model_id, and hardware_target to be non-empty strings.
Required BenchmarkSuite examples to be a non-empty sequence of BenchmarkExample instances.
Required BenchmarkSuite datasets to be a non-empty sequence of supported V1 datasets while normalizing list inputs to tuples.
why: V1 benchmark and release artifacts should be rooted in a well-formed suite identity, dataset set, and example collection, rather than allowing placeholder or malformed suite objects to flow into benchmark execution.
